== Notes for [[Item:Q3189|Q3189]] ==

If his mother married Ornate in Mexico, why is Antonio born in Spain? And how did he connect and marry Perez Bentancourt who has strong ties to Lancerota ,Canary Islands and where is the data on marriage. One profile has Antonio born in Lancerota and that can not be correct. Is he really the father of Antonio Perez who was born in Tenarife in the Canary Islands? I think Antonio was born in New Spain and has no connection to the Bentancourts.

I would like to see a real connection here, can anyone help?????

Please note that this link is yet unsubstantiated. Evidence as to exactly which BETHANCOURT (BETTENCOURT, BETANCUR) line of which Maria Perez de BETANCUR is descendant has not been determined. However; it is certain that she is descended from the BETANCUR's of the Canary Islands.
I am told by Canary Islanders that this line exists on record, hopefully someone will be able to research the records and shed light on this line of BETANCUR's that extend into New Mexico.

Based upon information available, this is the most likely link between Maria Perez de Betancur's family and the founding Betancur families of the Canary Islands. Again, this is not a definitive link, but a possible one. Perhaps it will prompt other researchers to pursue this important area of New Mexico genealogical history.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA7E6231EFBBFA9822EF79916C3445
geni:6000000005024502001


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
